name: LGM
description: Connect LaGrowthMachine to Claude — manage campaigns, leads, audiences and conversations directly from AI.
long_description: LaGrowthMachine (LGM) is a multichannel sales outreach platform. This extension gives Claude direct access to your LGM data: list campaigns, analyze performance, explore leads, read conversations, and save AI-generated preferences. No coding required — just install, enter your API key, and start asking Claude about your outreach.

tools.name: list_campaigns
tools.description: List all campaigns with filters (status, search) and pagination.

tools.name: get_campaign_stats
tools.description: Get detailed statistics for a campaign (acceptance rate, reply rate, conversions).

tools.name: get_audience_leads
tools.description: List leads in an audience with details (name, company, job title, email, LinkedIn).

tools.name: get_lead_logs
tools.description: Get activity logs for a lead (emails, LinkedIn messages, connection requests).

tools.name: get_lead_conversations
tools.description: Get all conversations with a lead across channels (LinkedIn, email).

tools.name: get_conversation_messages
tools.description: Get all messages in a conversation with content and timestamps.

tools.name: get_campaign_messages
tools.description: Get message templates for a campaign with HTML content and sequence order.

tools.name: get_audience
tools.description: Get detailed audience info (name, description, size, type, import status).

tools.name: save_identity_preference
tools.description: Save a preference for an identity to personalize AI-generated content.

tools.name: create_audience_from_linkedin_url
tools.description: Create or populate an audience from a LinkedIn search, Sales Navigator search, or LinkedIn post URL.

tools.name: list_identities
tools.description: List all connected identities (LinkedIn / email) for the authenticated user.

tools.name: search_lead
tools.description: Search for leads by any combination of identifiers (leadId, LinkedIn URL/ID, email, CRM ID, or firstname+lastname+company).

tools.name: create_or_update_lead
tools.description: Create or update a lead (upsert) attached to a required audience. Supports all profile fields and 10 long-text custom attributes.

tools.name: enrich_lead
tools.description: Enrich a lead's email and/or LinkedIn profile (EMAIL_ENRICH 5 cr | LINKEDIN_ENRICH 1 cr | FULL_ENRICH 5 cr). Requires explicit confirm=true to spend.

tools.name: bulk_enrich_audience
tools.description: Enrich leads in an audience by pages (1/2/5/10/20/all). Two-step confirm (preview + acknowledgedCostCredits lockstep). Throttled, returns audience URL.

tools.name: get_all_audience_leads
tools.description: Fetch N pages of audience leads in one auto-paginated call (1/2/5/10/20/all). Ask the user how many pages first.

tools.name: get_enrich_result
tools.description: Retrieve the result of an enrichment request (status + enriched data when completed).

tools.name: get_credits
tools.description: Get the current credit balance for the authenticated account (total + expiring soon).
